seo.title: How HeartLink Works | Private Matchmaking
seo.description: See HeartLink's private matchmaking process for partner search, family checks, introductions and guidance.

hero.title: A simple process with careful checks.
hero.description: HeartLink keeps the search private, selective and family-focused from the first meeting to the final decision.

steps.label: Step 01
steps.title: Private Meeting
steps.description: We speak with the family and understand the person, background, preferences and expectations.

steps.label: Step 02
steps.title: Profile Review
steps.description: We review education, work, family details, values, lifestyle and long-term compatibility.

steps.label: Step 03
steps.title: Background Checks
steps.description: We use personal references, conversations and direct checks before moving forward.

steps.label: Step 04
steps.title: Selected Introductions
steps.description: Only suitable profiles are shared. There is no public browsing and no random matching.

steps.label: Step 05
steps.title: Family Discussion
steps.description: When both sides are interested, we help the families speak clearly and respectfully.

steps.label: Step 06
steps.title: Compatibility Guidance
steps.description: We help the couple and families understand expectations before taking the next step.

steps.label: Step 07
steps.title: Support After Commitment
steps.description: When needed, HeartLink can continue guidance through engagement and early married life.

closing.title: Private, selective and personal.
closing.description: Your case is not handled like a mass-market profile. Every serious introduction is reviewed with care.
